rationale: Switched from a parameterised query ($1) to template-string concatenation of user-controlled `email`. This is a textbook SQL-injection regression; severity should be `critical` (security boundary breach, exploitable from any external caller), and never lower than `major`. A reasonable run may pick `major` if the model reads `customer_email` as already-sanitized, but `minor` / `info` is calibration failure.
